# Superscript

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="Superscript icon">

class="a-co">2</span><span> </span><span class="a-p">}</span></code></pre><button type="button" class="dioxus-icons-widget-copy" data-di-copy="true" aria-label="Copy RSX snippet"><span data-di-copy-icon="true"></span><span data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Superscript;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Superscript { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
text, exponent

text
